consumer_hint: Node v196 imported window result packet
scope: structured real-read runtime smoke evidence, failure taxonomy, and taxonomy digest verification sample for INFOJSON, STORAGEJSON, HEALTH, STATSJSON, and SMOKEJSON without executing LOAD, COMPACT, SETNXEX, or restore

expected: SMOKEJSON lists read commands and forbidden commands
SMOKEJSON exposes failure taxonomy categories and taxonomy_digest for imported window verification

node_consumption.node_may_read_when: mini-kv is already running and user enabled a safe real-read window
node_consumption.node_must_verify: failure_taxonomy.taxonomy_digest equals fnv1a64:f92fcba55feb26a2 before importing manual window results
node_consumption.node_must_not: auto-start mini-kv, execute LOAD/COMPACT/SETNXEX/restore, or treat mini-kv as Java order authority

boundaries: does not run Java or Node
not connected to Java transaction chain
mini-kv remains not Java order authority
failure taxonomy only; does not perform adapter retry logic

warnings: SMOKEJSON is a read adapter target, not an execution gate
SMOKEJSON aggregates runtime evidence but does not replace Java approval or ledger state
Node v196 must verify taxonomy_digest before importing manual window results
Failure taxonomy digest is evidence fingerprinting, not authentication or production authorization
pause_conditions: needs Node to auto-start Java or mini-kv
needs mini-kv in Java transaction consistency chain
taxonomy digest is missing or mismatched
failure category is unclear or maps to a write-capable command

failure_taxonomy.consumer: Node v196 imported window result packet

verification_sample.node_action: verify digest before importing manual window results

categories.meaning: the read adapter window is disabled before mini-kv TCP is touched
mini-kv is not listening or not reachable in the manual window
mini-kv accepted or received the read but did not answer within the adapter timeout
SMOKEJSON did not return parseable runtime_smoke JSON
one of SMOKEJSON, INFOJSON, STORAGEJSON, HEALTH, or STATSJSON returned an error
adapter attempted LOAD, COMPACT, SETNXEX, RESTORE, or another forbidden command
runtime evidence reported write/admin execution or a token created by smoke

failure_taxonomy.node_action: verify digest and stop before import when unsafe-surface or unexpected-write-signal appears
